name: @benchkit/monitor
description: GitHub Action: background system and custom metrics collection via OpenTelemetry Collector.

scripts.build: tsc && ncc build lib/main.js -o dist/main -s && ncc build lib/post.js -o dist/post -s && ncc build lib/cli.js -o dist/cli -s
scripts.test: tsc && node --test lib/cli.test.js lib/otel-config.test.js lib/otel-start.test.js lib/otel-stop.test.js
